raw_consumer_statement:
I am filing a complaint regarding American Express XXXX and the handling of complaint case XXXX. 

I was charged {$120.00} and had travel credits used in connection with a booking change that was not clearly authorized. As part of this change, my ticket was downgraded from first class to economy while I was still charged an additional {$120.00}, resulting in a worse travel outcome at a higher cost. 

Approximately XXXX week prior to my flight, I contacted American Express XXXX to book this flight. The call was disconnected before the booking was clearly confirmed. A voicemail was left but was not received at the time as it was filtered to my voicemail spam folder. Despite the lack of confirmed communication, a ticket was issued through XXXX XXXX shortly after that call. 

The night before my flight, when attempting to check in through the XXXX XXXX app, I received an error and discovered that a valid ticket had not been properly issued by American Express. I then spent approximately XXXX hours on the phone attempting to resolve the issue under time pressure. In total, I have spent over XXXX hours seeking updates, an explanation of the charge, correction of my travel credits, and a resolution timeline. 

I was given an estimated resolution date of XX/XX/XXXX and promised a XXXX callback, neither of which occurred. The case was then closed based on an alleged voicemail that I did not receive, with no additional follow-up attempts. 

This reflects a failure in the dispute resolution process. I am requesting a refund of the {$120.00} charge, correction of my travel credits, and additional goodwill compensation given the downgrade in service, time spent, and lack of follow-through.
